project.name: Akshaya Patra Employee Evaluation Platform
project.description: Multi-stage quarterly employee performance evaluation system. Manages self-assessment through four evaluator stages to produce Best Employee per branch per collar type.

scripts.build: prisma generate && prisma db push --accept-data-loss && next build

env_vars.name: DATABASE_URL
env_vars.description: Pooled PostgreSQL connection string. Include pgbouncer=true&connection_limit=1 for serverless.

env_vars.name: DIRECT_URL
env_vars.description: Direct PostgreSQL connection string. Used by Prisma for migrations.

env_vars.name: JWT_SECRET
env_vars.description: HS256 signing secret. Use a long random string (32+ chars).

env_vars.name: NODE_ENV
env_vars.description: production or development. Affects Prisma log level and Next.js optimizations.

env_vars.name: NEXTAUTH_URL
env_vars.description: Canonical URL of the app (e.g., https://yourapp.vercel.app). Used for cookie domain.

env_vars.name: BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN
env_vars.description: Vercel Blob API token. Required for HR PDF uploads (attendancePdfUrl, punctualityPdfUrl). NOT in .env.example — needs verification.

env_vars.name: ALLOW_FULL_SEED
env_vars.description: Set to '1' to allow the seed script to run. Without it, seed.ts is a no-op. DANGER: truncates users/departments/branches.

roles.name: ADMIN
roles.description: System administrator. Global access. Manages branches, employees, quarters, questions, assigns evaluators. No branch scope constraint.

roles.name: BRANCH_MANAGER
roles.description: Manages exactly one branch. Evaluates Stage-1 shortlisted employees at Stage 2 (all on SMALL; WC only on BIG). Assigns HODs on BIG branches.
roles.uniqueness: One per branch, one branch per manager (BranchManagerAssignment @unique on both bmUserId and branchId)

roles.name: HOD
roles.description: Head of Department. Evaluates blue-collar Stage-1 shortlisted employees at Stage 2 on BIG branches only. A HOD is a white-collar EMPLOYEE with a secondary password (passwordHod).
roles.note: User.role may remain EMPLOYEE; HOD role is granted via secondary password + active HodAssignment

roles.name: CLUSTER_MANAGER
roles.description: Evaluates Stage-2 shortlisted employees at Stage 3. Oversees one or more branches via ClusterManagerBranchAssignment.
roles.branch_scope: One CM per branch (branchId @unique in cm_branch_assignments); CM can have multiple branches

roles.name: HR
roles.description: Evaluates Stage-3 shortlisted employees at Stage 4 using attendance and punctuality data. Uploads PDFs to Vercel Blob.

roles.name: COMMITTEE
roles.description: Final review committee. Views Stage-4 results and declares Best Employee. No evaluation form — manual review via dashboard.

roles.name: SUPERVISOR
roles.description: DEPRECATED. Legacy role. In enum for historical data only. No active routes use it.

branch_types.name: BIG
branch_types.description: Large branch. Blue-collar employees evaluated by HOD at Stage 2. White-collar evaluated by BM. WC stage limits: 3/2/1. BC stage limits: 10/5/3.

branch_types.name: SMALL
branch_types.description: Standard branch. BM evaluates all collar types at Stage 2. Stage limits: 10/5/3 for all.

collar_types.name: WHITE_COLLAR
collar_types.description: Office/administrative staff. On BIG branches, evaluated by BM at Stage 2. Tighter limits (3/2/1).

collar_types.name: BLUE_COLLAR
collar_types.description: Operations/kitchen staff. On BIG branches, evaluated by HOD at Stage 2. Higher limits (10/5/3).

evaluation_stages.name: Evaluator Assessment
evaluation_stages.actor: BRANCH_MANAGER (WC everywhere; BC on SMALL) or HOD (BC on BIG)

evaluation_stages.name: Committee Review
evaluation_stages.note: No evaluation form. Committee views Stage-4 results and manually declares winners.

quarter_lifecycle: Questions assigned per employee; auto-winners declared for single-employee departments
Evaluation stages run: employees submit self-assessment; evaluators assess shortlisted employees
Quarter.status = CLOSED; results visible to admin and committee

default_password_rules.BM_CM_HR_COMMITTEE_ADMIN: Firstname_## — first word of full name + underscore + last 2 chars of empCode
default_password_rules.HOD_secondary: Same Firstname_## formula; stored in User.passwordHod
default_password_rules.fallback: empCode used if name parsing fails

login_flows.single_step: EMPLOYEE and ADMIN — empCode + password → JWT issued
login_flows.two_step_branch_pick: CM/HR/COMMITTEE with multiple branches — empCode + password → branchSelectToken → POST /api/auth/select-branch → JWT with chosen branchId
login_flows.two_step_role_pick: User who is both ADMIN and active HOD — empCode + HOD-password → roleSelectToken → POST /api/auth/select-role → JWT with chosen role
login_flows.hod_dual_password: Employee with active HodAssignment can login with primary password (→ EMPLOYEE) or secondary passwordHod (→ HOD)

critical_files.purpose: JWT verification and user-context header injection for all requests
critical_files.risk: high — all requests flow through this

critical_files.purpose: JWT sign/verify utilities (access, refresh, branch-select, role-select tokens)
critical_files.risk: high — token payload shape change is breaking

critical_files.purpose: RBAC higher-order function wrapping API route handlers
critical_files.risk: high — every protected route depends on it

critical_files.purpose: Validates user has access to the branchId in the URL
Verifies JWT branchId against assignment table for CM/HR/COMMITTEE
Generates default plain-text passwords for employees and staff
critical_files.risk: medium — change affects all new account creation

critical_files.purpose: Hashes and writes staff default password to User.password
Atomic BM assignment with uniqueness validation and old-BM demotion
critical_files.risk: high — non-atomic BM changes cause constraint violations

critical_files.purpose: Detects BM/CM/HR/COMMITTEE role-holders in bulk upload sheet
critical_files.risk: high — removing this guard allows silent role demotion

critical_files.purpose: Main login handler: single-step, branch-pick, role-pick, dual-password HOD
critical_files.risk: high — bugs here lock users out

critical_files.purpose: Stage-2 branch selection for multi-branch CM/HR/COMMITTEE users
Stage-2 role selection for ADMIN+HOD users
Quarter initialization: question assignment, auto-winners, notifications
critical_files.risk: high — not idempotent; auto-winners are irreversible

critical_files.purpose: Closes active quarter; no confirmed re-open route exists
Excel employee import with merge/replace modes and demotion guard
critical_files.risk: high — replace mode permanently archives employees

critical_files.purpose: BM Stage-2 evaluation submission
HOD assignment to department (BIG branches only)
critical_files.risk: medium — generates passwordHod; creates assignment rows

critical_files.purpose: HOD Stage-2 evaluation for blue-collar employees (BIG branches)
CM Stage-3 evaluation submission
HR Stage-4 evaluation with PDF upload — active status needs verification
Employee self-assessment submission; triggers Stage-1 shortlist recalculation
Score normalization and stage weighting formulas
critical_files.risk: high — used by every evaluation route; wrong math corrupts all rankings

critical_files.purpose: Stage-wise shortlist limits by branch type and collar type
critical_files.risk: high — consumed by shortlist manager and all evaluation routes

critical_files.purpose: Small-department auto-winner rule (4 cases) — legacy department-level path
Recalculates and upserts BranchShortlistStage* after each evaluation
critical_files.risk: high — stage cascades; wrong rank = broken pipeline

critical_files.purpose: Per-employee randomized question assignment at quarter start
critical_files.risk: medium — called once at quarter start; errors skip employee silently

critical_files.purpose: createNotification, notifyAllEmployees
Standardized HTTP response helpers and validateBody (Zod + XSS sanitization)
Zod schemas for all request bodies
Prisma singleton client with dev-reuse and health-check
Role-aware sidebar navigation structure
critical_files.risk: low — must stay in sync with app/dashboard/ page paths

critical_files.purpose: Complete database schema: 25 models, 7 enums, all constraints
critical_files.risk: high — @unique constraints are load-bearing; db push can drop data

critical_files.purpose: Seeds DB with branch, departments, employees (requires ALLOW_FULL_SEED=1)
CLI bulk employee import from Excel per branch
Idempotent sync of question bank from seed file to DB
Main layout wrapper: sidebar + topbar + content for all protected pages
Role-aware collapsible sidebar, reads from lib/dashboardNav.js
Top bar with current quarter name and logout button
Shared evaluation form used for BM, HOD, CM, self-assessment
critical_files.risk: medium — shared across multiple evaluator types

critical_files.purpose: Design tokens (tokens.js), icons (Icons.jsx), primitive UI components (index.jsx)

auth.description: Main login: empCode + password. Returns JWT or stage-1 token for multi-step flows.
Returns current user profile + active quarter name.
Refreshes access token via refresh token cookie.
Stage-2: CM/HR/COMMITTEE pick branch after initial login.
Stage-2: ADMIN+HOD pick role after initial login.

admin.description: List all branches with dept/employee counts.
Excel bulk import. Modes: merge (default) or replace.
Set custom stage limits for branch+quarter (BranchEvalConfig).
Add individual employee. Restricted to HR_ALLOWED empCodes: 1800349, 5100029.
Initialize quarter: assign questions, declare auto-winners. NOT idempotent.
Close active quarter. Results become visible.
Assign evaluator role to user per department.
Force reset user password to default.

branch_manager.description: BM evaluation questions for current quarter.
Submit Stage-2 evaluation for shortlisted employee.
Assign HOD to department (BIG branches only).
Pool of WC employees eligible to be HODs.

hod.description: HOD evaluation questions for current quarter.
HOD evaluation queue (BC employees in assigned departments).
Submit Stage-2 HOD evaluation (BIG branches only).

hr.description: Submit Stage-4 evaluation with attendance/punctuality data. Status: needs verification (may be legacy).

committee.description: View final Stage-4 results to declare Best Employee.

assessment.description: Fetch per-employee randomized SELF questions for current quarter.
Submit self-assessment. Triggers Stage-1 shortlist recalculation.

employee.description: Employee's current evaluation status in the pipeline.

models.name: User
models.key_fields: id, empCode, name, password, passwordHod, role, departmentId(nullable), branchId(nullable), collarType, designation, mobile

models.name: Quarter
models.key_fields: id, name, status(ACTIVE|CLOSED), startDate, endDate, questionCount, bmQuestionCount, hodQuestionCount, cmQuestionCount

models.name: Question
models.key_fields: id, text, textHindi, category(7 values), level(6 values), isActive

models.name: SelfAssessment
models.key_fields: id, userId, quarterId, answers(JSON), rawScore, maxScore, normalizedScore, completionTimeSeconds

models.name: BranchManagerEvaluation
models.key_fields: id, managerId, employeeId, quarterId, answers(JSON), bmRawScore, bmNormalized, bmContribution, stage3CombinedScore

models.name: HodEvaluation
models.key_fields: id, hodId, employeeId, quarterId, answers(JSON), hodRawScore, hodNormalized, hodContribution, stage2CombinedScore

models.name: ClusterManagerEvaluation
models.key_fields: id, clusterId, employeeId, quarterId, answers(JSON), cmRawScore, cmNormalized, cmContribution, finalScore

models.name: HrEvaluation
models.key_fields: id, hrUserId, employeeId, quarterId, attendancePct, workingHours, attendancePdfUrl, punctualityPdfUrl, hrScore, stage4CombinedScore

models.name: BranchShortlistStage1
models.key_fields: userId, quarterId, branchId, collarType, selfScore, rank

models.name: BranchShortlistStage2
models.key_fields: userId, quarterId, branchId, collarType, selfScore, evaluatorScore, combinedScore, rank

models.name: BranchShortlistStage3
models.key_fields: userId, quarterId, branchId, collarType, cmScore, combinedScore, rank

models.name: BranchShortlistStage4
models.key_fields: userId, quarterId, branchId, collarType, hrScore, attendancePct, combinedScore, rank

models.name: ClusterManagerBranchAssignment
models.key_constraints: branchId @unique (one CM per branch); (cmUserId, branchId) composite unique

models.name: BranchEvalConfig
models.key_fields: branchId, quarterId, stage1CutoffPct, stage2Limit, stage3Limit, stage4Limit

models.name: EmployeeAssignmentHistory
models.key_fields: userId(SetNull FK), empCode, oldRole, newRole, oldDepartmentName, newDepartmentName, oldBranchName, newBranchName, changedBy

models.name: ArchivedEmployee
models.key_fields: empCode, name, department, removalDate, reasonLeaving, archivedBy, originalUserId

business_rules.value: One BM per branch and one branch per BM. Enforced by BranchManagerAssignment with @unique on both bmUserId and branchId. Use lib/auth/bmAssignment.js for atomic assignment.
One CM per branch (ClusterManagerBranchAssignment.branchId @unique). A CM can oversee multiple branches.
HOD assignment only available when Branch.branchType === 'BIG'. Returns 403 on SMALL branches.
HOD must be a WHITE_COLLAR employee in the same branch. BM picks from white-collar pool.
HOD logs in with passwordHod (Firstname_##). Primary password (empCode) gives EMPLOYEE role. Both stored on same User record.
BIG branch: WC → BM evaluates (limit 3). BIG branch: BC → HOD evaluates (limit 10). SMALL branch: all → BM evaluates (limit 10).
Top 50% by normalizedScore. Overridable via BranchEvalConfig.stage1CutoffPct per branch+quarter.
combinedScore = (selfNormalized × 0.60) + (evaluatorNormalized × 0.40)
Department with exactly 1 EMPLOYEE is declared auto-winner at quarter start. Logged to AuditLog.
empCode (verbatim, used as initial password)
Firstname_## — first word of full name + '_' + last 2 chars of empCode. Bcrypt-hashed with 10 rounds.
ADMIN users are never overwritten or demoted in any bulk upload mode.
Merge mode: rejects entire upload if BM/CM/HR/COMMITTEE role-holder found in sheet. Replace mode: skips those rows.
Bulk upload replace mode archives all employees not in the sheet to ArchivedEmployee and deletes them from User.
Only empCodes 1800349 (Rishpal Kumawat) and 5100029 (Chetan Singh Bhati) can create individual employees via POST /api/admin/employees.
POST /api/admin/quarters/start must not be called twice. No confirmed re-open route for closed quarters.
Every logout adds a row to BlacklistedToken. Table must be manually pruned via /api/admin/maintenance/prune-blacklist.
Changing Branch.branchType during an active quarter will orphan BC employees routed to HOD and break Stage-2.
For CM/HR/COMMITTEE, JWT branchId is validated against the assignment table on every request by resolveScopeBranch(). Do not rely on JWT alone.
normalizedScore = Math.round((rawScore / maxScore) * 100 × 100) / 100. Must use consistent rounding; float storage means tied ranks are possible.
prisma/seed.ts requires ALLOW_FULL_SEED=1 env var. Without it, runs as no-op.

known_pitfalls: Branch leakage: multi-branch roles (CM/HR/COMMITTEE) must validate JWT branchId against DB assignment table (resolveScopeBranch). Do not skip this check.
HOD role overlap: changing User.role or clearing User.passwordHod without removing HodAssignment + DepartmentRoleMapping will break HOD auth.
Login regression: three code paths in login/route.js. Fix to one path may silently break another. Test all three after any change.
Import overwrite: bulk upload replace mode permanently archives employees not in sheet. Test with merge mode first.
Collar type mismatch: User.collarType overrides Department.collarType. Moving user to new dept without updating collarType routes them to wrong evaluator.
BIG/SMALL branch divergence: HOD path only exists for BIG. Changing branchType mid-quarter orphans BC employees.
Quarter start not idempotent: calling twice creates duplicate question assignments and re-sends auto-winner notifications.
CM reassignment: whether ClusterManagerBranchAssignment has an atomic-clear function like BM is unconfirmed. Direct assignment may throw unique constraint error.
Token blacklist growth: BlacklistedToken never auto-pruned. prune-blacklist must be called on a schedule.
Score precision: float ranks can tie; shortlist rank assignment must handle ties consistently.
db push in build: build command uses 'prisma db push --accept-data-loss' which can silently drop columns. Use 'prisma migrate deploy' in production.
Admin route scoping: ADMIN uses URL [branchId] for branch scope, not JWT. Do not add JWT branch checks to admin routes.
HR PDF token: BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN not in .env.example. Missing token silently fails HR PDF uploads.
